untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cointegration testing with SPY benchmark and advanced mean-reversion statistical framework (linear mean reversion signal generation, half-life calculation, Johansen cointegration test). These are portfolio-level statistical tests and regime identifiers not available in the allowed indicator list. The signal also references internal methodology ('Chapter 2') without specifying exact parameter values (lookback_period, threshold, half_life marked as AUTHOR_SILENT). A proper implementation requires custom cointegration module and mean-reversion signal generator outside standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses price crossing SMA_20 as proxy for mean reversion entry/exit, but this fundamentally misrepresents the signal's statistical cointegration framework. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction reflects that long/short decision depends on portfolio-SPY spread position, not fixed directional bias. Recommend implementing custom cointegration-based strategy module rather than forcing into standard technical indicator schema.
